name: Semiconductor Photocatalysis (TiO2)
description: In TiO2 photocatalysis, photons above the band gap excite electron-hole pairs; charges either recombine (losing energy) or migrate to the surface, where they drive redox reactions that generate reactive oxygen species and degrade adsorbed pollutants.

    N2{"Photon ≥ band gap?"}

    N11["Pollutant degraded"]
